title: TenorLite
description: An optimized experience of pure vanilla with improvements to visual and auditory elements, ready for multiplayer.
body:
► No game-changing mods

► Multiplayer-ready with Simple Voice Chat

► Intended to improve visual and auditory gameplay experience

 

Comes with a few shaders out of the box. No extra setup needed!

This is a simple, very lightweight and reliable optimization-based pack that won't break your world every time a new update comes out.

Relax, connect with your friends and enjoy!

 

Includes these shaders and textures:

• Complementary Reimagined 2.2

• Rethinking Voxels

• Icons

• Particles+
